title: Guilded Revenge
description: This texture pack seeks to revamp all of the tools and armor, while still staying faithful to vanilla!
body:
![You just lost the game >:3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb95d3b00aaa4bb4f171961bdeabae4075be6cd9.png)
### All tools/weapons that are currently changed
![All of the tools/weapons that are changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/666823e5903abefe307670fd18707588ea002c6f.png)

### Leather armor is Not added yet, but here is the armor!
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a921d903eb6d719c12736edd674e14c9c39669d8.png)

## Soon to come:
- Custom Leather armor
- (some) Mod compatability
- Custom dark & light GUI

## Q&A:

<details>
<summary>Where can I submit ideas/suggestions?</summary>
You can submit ideas/suggestions in my discord server!

Click the join discord server in the links tab on the right to do that if you dont know lol

</details>

<details>
<summary>How can I support you?</summary>

For now you can only support by boosting my discord server, but a ko-fi might happen if this 
gets enough attention! (if you did have this question then tysm!!!)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Am I allowed to make addons/inspired textures packs/mods?</summary>

YES PLEASE!! Just please make sure to credit me for the insperation!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Can I use this texture pack in a video?</summary>

Go right ahead! And dont bother crediting me lol (but credit would be greatly apreciated :D)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Am I allowed to reupload this pack anywhere else?</summary>

No.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Are you going to upload this pack anywhere else?</summary>

Again, no.

</details>
